skill.name: Dive Strike
skill.description: While airborne, punch with your fist, strike with a shield or stab with a dagger to propel yourself forwards. Unlocking this skill also increases your max health.

subSkills.name: Discombobulate
subSkills.description: Blunt damage delivered to enemies' heads causes them to be stunned.

subSkills.name: Ranged Expertise
subSkills.description: Arrows and daggers pierce through enemies, and you throw weapons with more force.

subSkills.name: Skulker
subSkills.description: You are much harder to detect when crouching, and can pickpocket weapons from enemies.

skill.name: Second Wind
skill.description: Cheat death once per day. When triggered, nearby enemies are knocked over and you enter a brief rage, with increased strength and speed. Unlocking this skill also increases your max health.

subSkills.name: Boomerang
subSkills.description: Shields will ricochet into enemies when thrown, and attempt to return to you on the second bounce.

subSkills.name: Flykick
subSkills.description: Kicking while airborne will launch you forward.

subSkills.name: Wrestler
subSkills.description: Grabbing enemies with two hands allows you to pick them up and throw them around.

skill.name: Martial Protege
skill.description: You can grab enemies with two hands and pull to tear off their limbs, as well as slice off limbs with an open-palm chop. Unlocking this skill also increases your max health.

subSkills.name: Intimidation
subSkills.description: Enemies that witness death and brutality of their allies may surrender to you in fear.

subSkills.name: Juggernaut
subSkills.description: Become an unstoppable force while sprinting, knocking back enemies you come into contact with.

subSkills.name: Mighty Kick
subSkills.description: Kicks have increased power, now capable of sending enemies flying.

skill.name: Slow Time
skill.description: Utilize Focus to slow time by pressing the slow time button. Focus runs out but can regain when not being used. Unlocking this skill also increases your maximum Focus pool.

subSkills.name: Telethrow
subSkills.description: Throw objects you have grabbed with telekinesis.

subSkills.name: Combat Focus
subSkills.description: Regenerate Focus from combat actions, such as parrying, achieving headshots, disarming enemies, deflecting fireballs, and killing enemies.

subSkills.name: Telespin
subSkills.description: Attract and repel an item at the same time (trigger + spell wheel button) to rapidly spin it in the air. Costs Focus.

skill.name: Hyperfocus
skill.description: Hold the Slow Time button down to enter Hyperfocus. Time moves incredibly slowly, but you do not. Unlocking this skill also increases your maximum Focus pool.

subSkills.name: Focused Reflexes
subSkills.description: Enter Hyperfocus automatically when a projectile is coming toward you.

subSkills.name: Emergency Exit
subSkills.description: Enemies remain slowed for a few seconds when you run out of Focus while time is slowed.

subSkills.name: Precision Focus
subSkills.description: Drawing a bow while in the air triggers Hyperfocus with no Focus cost.

skill.name: Marionette
skill.description: Telekinesis now works on enemies. Unlocking this skill also increases your maximum Focus pool.

subSkills.name: Force Choke
subSkills.description: Telegrab an enemy by the neck to slowly choke them to death.

subSkills.name: Stagger Throw
subSkills.description: Throw enemies with Telekinesis to stagger them in a direction.

subSkills.name: Rip and Tear
subSkills.description: Telegrab two limbs of an enemy and pull apart to dismember them.

skill.name: Gravity Push
skill.description: Charge and cast a gravity wave that can stagger enemies.

subSkills.name: Feather Fall
subSkills.description: Cast and hold the gravity spell towards the ground to slow your fall.

subSkills.name: Impact Pulse
subSkills.description: Attacks with blunt gravity imbued weapons send enemies flying.

subSkills.name: Lithobrake
subSkills.description: Levitated enemies will slam to the ground once Levitation wears off.

skill.name: Boost Jump
skill.description: You can launch yourself by throwing a Gravity Push downwards. If you're in the air, you can push yourself in any direction. Unlocking this skill also boosts your Gravity charge speed and push force.

subSkills.name: Airstrike
subSkills.description: Punch downwards while falling with Gravity equipped to trigger a shockwave when you hit the ground.

subSkills.name: Riptide
subSkills.description: After you knock a creature over with a Gravity Push, quickly grip to hold them in the air, then throw to propel them.

subSkills.name: Weightless Boost
subSkills.description: Briefly become weightless after using a Boost Jump.

skill.name: Gravity Bubble
skill.description: Merge two Gravity spells, then pull your hands apart to create a bubble of zero gravity. Unlocking this skill also boosts your Gravity charge speed and push force.

subSkills.name: Dilation Bubble
subSkills.description: The Gravity Bubble now slows time for all objects inside it. Thrown items will keep their velocity when they exit the bubble, and you consume Focus at a vastly reduced rate.

subSkills.name: Gravity Hammer
subSkills.description: With a staff, point it at an object or enemy and press the use button to grab and freely manipulate it.

subSkills.name: Impulse Spike
subSkills.description: A point blank, pinpoint Gravity Push to enemy limbs can dismember them.

skill.name: Fireball
skill.description: Charge a fireball by holding down the spell trigger. Once the spell is fully charged, throw your hand forwards and release the trigger to cast the fireball. The fireball can be guided through the air with your hand.

subSkills.name: Fireball Ricochet
subSkills.description: Fireballs can bounce off surfaces and metal armour, ricocheting into nearby enemies.

subSkills.name: Molten Arc
subSkills.description: Fire imbued weapons spray molten metal when swung that Ignites enemies.

subSkills.name: Conflagration
subSkills.description: Ignited enemies can spread ignition to nearby enemies.

skill.name: Remote Detonation
skill.description: Charging a fireball detonates the last fireball you threw with that hand, creating an explosion. Unlocking this skill also increases your Fire charge speed, fireball damage and enemies burn for longer

subSkills.name: Ignition Burst
subSkills.description: Enemies caught in the radius of a remote detonation will heat up and eventually ignite.

subSkills.name: Heatwave
subSkills.description: Charge the Fire spell and throw your hand without releasing it to punch a cone of flames that deals damage and Ignites enemies.

subSkills.name: Heavy Firepower
subSkills.description: Fireballs stagger enemies and impart extra force on objects hit.

skill.name: Meteor
skill.description: Charge two Fire spells separately, then merge your hands together to combine them. Once the merge is fully charged, you can throw a massive, explosive meteor.

subSkills.name: Detonation Swarm
subSkills.description: Remote Detonating a fireball on an Ignited enemy or corpse causes a homing projectile to emerge.

subSkills.name: Inferno Staff
subSkills.description: With a fire imbued staff, press the use button to spray a torrent of flames. Watch the recoil...

subSkills.name: Twin Flame
subSkills.description: Detonate two fireballs simultaneously to link them, superheating the air and igniting everything between them.

skill.name: Lightning Spray
skill.description: Cast lightning streams from your hands to shock enemies, locking them down. Unlocking this skill also increases your Max Mana.

subSkills.name: Static Disarm
subSkills.description: Zapping enemy weapons with Lightning Spray has a chance to disarm them.

subSkills.name: Shock Trip
subSkills.description: After being electrocuted, enemies fall over.

subSkills.name: Electromagnetism
subSkills.description: Lightning imbued arrows and throwing weapons are attracted to enemies when shot or thrown.

skill.name: Charge Sapping
skill.description: Lightning Spray will sap magic from a lightning-imbued weapon or spell in your other hand, granting it increased range and power. Unlocking this skill also boosts your Lightning charge speed, and allows you to spray for longer.

subSkills.name: Overcharge
subSkills.description: Lightning Spray gains a burst of power and damage just before you run out of charge.

subSkills.name: Chain Lightning
subSkills.description: Lightning Spray chains lightning between enemies and metallic objects.

subSkills.name: Shock Parry
subSkills.description: Parrying enemy attacks with a Lightning-imbued weapon causes them to be electrocuted.

skill.name: Lightning Beam
skill.description: Merge two Lightning spells, then spread your palms to unleash a beam of pure electricity. Unlocking this skill also boosts your Lightning charge speed, and allows you to spray for longer.

subSkills.name: Tesla Wires
subSkills.description: Touching two lightning imbued weapons together forms a slicing Arcwire between them for a short time.

subSkills.name: Thunderbolt
subSkills.description: Charge and throw the Lightning spell to launch a thunderbolt that chains to nearby enemies. Benefits from charge sapping.

subSkills.name: Arcwire
subSkills.description: With a lightning imbued staff, press the use button and swing to whip a shocking, slicing wire of lightning.

skill.name: Fan the flames
skill.description: Gravity push a burning enemy to spread heat to nearby enemies, eventually causing them to ignite. [Small Fire Crystal Core + Small Gravity Crystal Core]

skill.name: Repelling Burst
skill.description: Remote Detonation pushes enemies back, staggering them. [Fire Crystal Core + Gravity Crystal Core]

skill.name: Supernova
skill.description: Merge a fire and gravity spell to throw a supernova which collapses into a black hole. [Great Fire Crystal Core + Great Gravity Crystal Core]

skill.name: Fire Sapping
skill.description: Charge sapping fire magic will Ignite enemies hit by Lightning Spray. [Fire Crystal Core + Lightning Crystal Core]

skill.name: Plasma Beam
skill.description: Merge a fire and lightning spell, then pull your palms apart to blow a stream of white-hot flames that leaves a trail of magma. [Great Fire Crystal Core + Great Lightning Crystal Core]

skill.name: Burning Grasp
skill.description: Cast fire while grabbing an enemy to Ignite them, dealing damage over time. [Small Fire Crystal Core + Small Body Crystal Core]

skill.name: Rocket Punch
skill.description: Charge fire while making a fist and punch to rocket you and your enemies away. [Fire Crystal Core + Body Crystal Core]

skill.name: Homing Redirection
skill.description: Fireballs grabbed out of the air and thrown with Telekinesis home in on enemies. [Small Fire Crystal Core + Small Mind Crystal Core]

skill.name: Gravity Sapping
skill.description: Charge Sapping gravity magic will inflict Levitation on enemies hit by Lightning Spray. [Gravity Crystal Core + Lightning Crystal Core]

skill.name: Storm Funnel
skill.description: Summon a massive Lightning tornado that shocks and sweeps up everything nearby. [Great Gravity Crystal Core + Great Lightning Crystal Core]

skill.name: Floating Grasp
skill.description: Cast gravity while grabbing an enemy to Levitate them. [Small Gravity Crystal Core + Small Body Crystal Core]

skill.name: Force Punch
skill.description: Charge gravity while making a fist and punch to inflict Levitation to enemies. [Great Gravity Crystal Core + Great Body Crystal Core]

skill.name: Weightless Kinesis
skill.description: Objects that you Telegrab become lighter weight and easier to handle. [Small Gravity Crystal Core + Small Mind Crystal Core]

skill.name: Thunder Punch
skill.description: Charge lightning while making a fist and punch an enemy to shock them and nearby enemies in a burst of sparks.

skill.name: No Skill
skill.description: No Skill

skill.name: Shocking Grasp
skill.description: Cast Lightning while grabbing an enemy to electrocute them and deal damage over time.

skill.name: Achronal Bolts
skill.description: Lightning Spray is not slowed down when you are in Slow Time or Hyperfocus.

skill.name: Weapon Theft
skill.description: Steal weapons out of enemies' hands by grabbing the hand with Telekinesis and pulling.

skill.name: Floating Grasp
skill.description: Cast gravity while grabbing an enemy to Levitate them.

skill.name: Force Punch
skill.description: Charge gravity while making a fist and punch to inflict Levitation to enemies.

skill.name: Burning Grasp
skill.description: Cast fire while grabbing an enemy to Ignite them, dealing damage over time.

skill.name: Rocket Punch
skill.description: Charge fire while making a fist and punch to rocket you and your enemies away.

skill.name: Temporal Riposte
skill.description: Enemies are briefly slowed when you successfully parry a weapon.
